contents: {a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} began a line of his own merchandise, starting with a mug of Craig cozy inside a blanket and drinking a mug of Craig cozy inside a blanket and drinking a mug of Craig cozy inside a blanket and drinking a mug.

{a=Person_Ritikl}Ritikl{/} and {a=Person_Erra}Erra{/} summoned the devil to get {a=Person_JoeBeanie}Joe Beanie{/} to admit that they are not innocent. After Erra was too eager and requested for bananas wearing top hats, the devil took away Ritikl's soul and vibrating wand. Erra and the devil then played Shady Lude Kart together.
